merge_rule: All PRs target ux-refresh-simplified-challenge-driven as base (never main) until Phase 9 rollout. Use gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch after CodeRabbit clears.
review_trigger: Comment `@coderabbitai review` on every PR after open (CodeRabbit auto-skips non-main bases otherwise).
build_check: npx next build (must pass before commit). Dev server is always-on at :3001 — do not start.
